name: Azure / Entra ID Admin
description: Manage Entra ID users and groups via Microsoft Graph. Supports listing, creating, updating, disabling, and deleting users and groups. Requires a configured service principal profile or an interactive Graph session.

config_requirements.description: Azure tenant ID (GUID). Optional if connecting interactively via connect_tenant.
Service principal / app registration client ID.
Service principal client secret. Keep this secret — it grants access to your Entra ID tenant.

actions.name: az_connect_tenant
actions.description: Open an interactive browser session to authenticate with Microsoft Graph. Use this once to establish a delegated session (e.g. when service principal credentials are not configured). NOTE: session does not persist across tool calls — prefer configuring a service principal profile.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Optional Azure tenant ID to target a specific tenant.

parameters.name: scopes
parameters.description: Comma-separated Graph permission scopes. Defaults to User.ReadWrite.All, Group.ReadWrite.All, Directory.Read.All.

actions.name: az_get_user
actions.description: Retrieve a single Entra ID user by their user ID or user principal name.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The user's object ID (GUID) or user principal name (email).

parameters.name: select_properties
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to return. Defaults to id, displayName, userPrincipalName, accountEnabled, mail, jobTitle, department.

actions.name: az_list_users
actions.description: List Entra ID users, optionally filtering by display name or UPN prefix.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional prefix to filter users by displayName or userPrincipalName.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return. Defaults to 25.

actions.name: az_create_user
actions.description: Create a new Entra ID user with a temporary password.

parameters.name: display_name
parameters.description: Full display name for the new user.

parameters.name: user_principal_name
parameters.description: Login name, usually in the form user@domain.com.

parameters.name: mail_nickname
parameters.description: Mail alias / nickname (the part before the @ in the UPN).

parameters.name: temporary_password
parameters.description: Temporary password. User will be prompted to change it on first sign-in by default.

parameters.name: account_enabled
parameters.description: Whether the account is enabled. Accepts 'true' or 'false'. Defaults to true.

parameters.name: force_change_password_next_sign_in
parameters.description: Whether to force a password change on first sign-in. Accepts 'true' or 'false'. Defaults to true.

actions.name: az_update_user
actions.description: Update one or more profile fields on an existing Entra ID user.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The user's object ID or user principal name.

parameters.name: display_name
parameters.description: New display name.

parameters.name: job_title
parameters.description: Job title.

parameters.name: department
parameters.description: Department.

parameters.name: mobile_phone
parameters.description: Mobile phone number.

parameters.name: office_location
parameters.description: Office location.

parameters.name: account_enabled
parameters.description: Enable or disable the account ('true'/'false').

actions.name: az_disable_user
actions.description: Disable an Entra ID user account. The account is not deleted and can be re-enabled.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The user's object ID or user principal name.

actions.name: az_delete_user
actions.description: Permanently delete an Entra ID user. This action is destructive and requires approval.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The user's object ID or user principal name.

actions.name: az_get_group
actions.description: Retrieve an Entra ID group by its object ID or display name prefix.

parameters.name: group_id_or_name
parameters.description: The group's object ID (GUID) or display name prefix.

actions.name: az_list_groups
actions.description: List Entra ID groups, optionally filtering by display name prefix.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional prefix to filter groups by displayName.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of groups to return. Defaults to 25.

actions.name: az_create_security_group
actions.description: Create a new Entra ID security group.

parameters.name: display_name
parameters.description: Display name for the new group.

parameters.name: mail_nickname
parameters.description: Mail alias for the group (no spaces).

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Optional description for the group.

actions.name: az_add_group_member
actions.description: Add a user or object to an Entra ID group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The group's object ID (GUID).

parameters.name: member_id
parameters.description: The object ID of the user or object to add.

actions.name: az_remove_group_member
actions.description: Remove a member from an Entra ID group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The group's object ID (GUID).

parameters.name: member_id
parameters.description: The object ID of the member to remove.

actions.name: az_list_group_members
actions.description: List all members of an Entra ID group.

parameters.name: group_id
parameters.description: The group's object ID (GUID).

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of members to return. Defaults to 100.

actions.name: az_export_users_csv
actions.description: Export all Entra ID users to a CSV file at the specified output path.

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Full file path for the output CSV file.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to export. Defaults to 999.
